articles.author: News.com.au
articles.title: Australia PM stuns with ‘horrific’ viral comment in parliament: ‘WTF did I just watch?’ - New York Post
articles.description: Prime Minister explicitly described the problems caused by social media in such a shocking way that viewers refused to believe it was real.
articles.content:
A clip of Anthony Albanese addressing parliament about cracking down further on the social media ban has gone viral but not for the reason you might expect.
Speaking on Thursday, the Prime Minister … [+5123 chars]
